title: Head of Revenue Operations
location: Tel Aviv, Israel / New York (Global, distributed)
description: Finout, a cloud cost management SaaS company, seeks a Head of Revenue Operations to build and scale the operational backbone of its go-to-market engine. Reporting to the CRO, this hands-on leadership role requires 7+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Ops, or Strategy within high-growth B2B SaaS, proven experience scaling beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce expertise, and cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR, including collaboration with the Tel Aviv HQ.
score_reason: Exceptional match across all dimensions: 15+ years exceeds 7+ requirement, B2B SaaS expertise aligns perfectly, Salesforce proficiency is core strength, and experience scaling revenue operations to $30M+ ARR is directly relevant. Tel Aviv location with global distributed option matches preferences exactly.
ai_opener: Hi [Hiring Manager], I came across Finout's Head of Revenue Operations role and it resonated immediately—I've spent 15+ years building scalable RevOps foundations for high-growth B2B SaaS companies, with direct experience scaling revenue operations through the $30M+ ARR inflection point. Having led cross-functional GTM initiatives across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and operations in fintech and cloud infrastructure environments, I'm particularly drawn to Finout's cloud cost management mission and the chance to build the operational backbone reporting directly to your CRO. I'd love to explore how my experience with Salesforce-centric infrastructure and distributed team leadership could accelerate your go-to-market scaling.

title: RevOps Manager, Territory Strategy & Operations
description: Gong seeks a Revenue Operations Manager focused on Territory Strategy & Operations to accelerate revenue growth through data-driven investment strategy and scalable territory design. Responsibilities include maintaining territory mapping in CRM systems (Fullcast, Salesforce), partnering with Sales leadership and Finance, and leading market expansion projects. Requires 3–5+ years in Revenue Operations or Sales Strategy, deep understanding of B2B SaaS go-to-market models, strong analytical skills (Excel, SQL, BI tools), and proficiency with Salesforce.
score_reason: Exceptional match: Senior RevOps executive with 15+ years B2B SaaS experience directly aligns with Territory Strategy & Operations focus, Salesforce proficiency, and data-driven GTM leadership. Gong.io's scale, AI-native platform, and revenue acceleration mandate are ideal for candidate's seniority and analytics expertise.
ai_opener: Omri, I noticed Gong is building out Territory Strategy & Operations—a critical function at your scale. With your 15+ years architecting revenue systems and territory models across hypergrowth SaaS environments, you'd bring both the Salesforce depth and GTM strategy perspective that typically takes teams months to develop. I'd love to explore whether this RevOps Manager role aligns with your next move.

title: Senior Revenue Operations Manager
location: Remote (US or Canada, Eastern time zone preferred)
description: IntellaQuest (an ASG company) is bringing in its first RevOps professional to serve as the strategic backbone of its GTM engine. As a player-coach reporting to the C-suite, you'll architect systems, processes, and insights driving predictable revenue across Sales, Marketing, and Customer Success. Requires GTM/RevOps experience in Mid-Market or Lower Enterprise sales ($25k–$75k ACV), companies at $5M–$30M ARR, and deep experience with GTM tech stacks including HubSpot, Salesforce, and Gong. Salary $130k–$140k base plus bonus.
score_reason: Exceptional alignment: Senior RevOps role with GTM architecture mandate, Mid-Market/Lower Enterprise ACV sweet spot, $5M-$30M ARR stage, and explicit HubSpot/Salesforce requirements all match Omri's core expertise and target roles. Remote structure and C-suite reporting are ideal for a 15+ year executive.
ai_opener: Omri here—I noticed IntellaQuest is bringing in its first RevOps professional to architect the GTM engine. With 15+ years building revenue operations at B2B SaaS companies in the $5M-$30M ARR range, I've built playbooks across HubSpot/Salesforce implementations, pipeline forecasting, and scaling Sales/Marketing/CS alignment that typically drive 30-40% pipeline efficiency gains. I'd be curious to explore how I can be that strategic backbone for your team.

Your GTM Systems Engineer position seems positioned at exactly that intersection: combining operational rigor with modern AI tooling to unlock new GTM velocity.
